prompt: Add a DELETE endpoint for saved dashboards. When the user clicks a delete button in the dashboard gallery, it should remove the dashboard from the re_dashboard table. I need the backend route, the Next API handler, and a test.

assertions.text: Skill reads CLAUDE.md (or generates it from tips.md) at the start
Skill correctly identifies this as a repo-b Next route handler change (not a backend/FastAPI change)
Skill creates or modifies a route file under repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/
Skill writes at least one test (Vitest or pytest) for the new endpoint
Skill runs a local test command (make test-frontend or equivalent) and reports the result
Skill specifies a curl smoke command against paulmalmquist.com or the Railway backend URL
